text: Hello. Are you there? Hello. Hello. Good afternoon. This is Rachel. So I'm calling because they're pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Alabama State Relief Program. So have you been notified about these benefits yet? No, I haven't. What benefits? Well, I really want to help you get this taken care of as these benefits are time sensitive. So you do have Medicare Part A and B, right? No, I don't. Sorry, but you did not seem to qualify for the plans that we have. Have a great day.
